---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2b45,#1a4a6e); color:white; padding:1rem 2rem;">
  <div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:2.4rem; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Contact</h1>
    <p style="color:#c8d8e8;">I'm always happy to discuss research collaborations, questions, or opportunities.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TWO COLUMN LAYOUT -->
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:220px 1fr; gap:2rem; padding:2rem;">

  <!-- PROFILE SIDEBAR -->
  <div>
    <div class="profile-card">
      <img src="figures/Tika_Face.JPG" alt="Tika Ram Gurung"/>
      <div class="profile-name">Tika Ram Gurung</div>
      <div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate<br/>University of Nebraska-Lincoln</div>
      <ul class="profile-links">
        <li>📍 Lincoln, NE</li>
        <li>✉️ <a href="mailto:tikargrg@gmail.com">tikargrg@gmail.com</a></li>
        <li>🔬 <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a></li>
        <li>🎓 <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a></li>
        <li>💼 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tika-ram-gurung-55a743a3/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
        <li>🔵 <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4287-6150" target="_blank">ORCID</a></li>
        <li>🐦 <a href="https://x.com/TR_Gurung" target="_blank">X / Twitter</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2b45,#1a4a6e); color:white; padding:1rem 1rem 1rem;">
  <div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:2.4rem; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Publications</h1>
    <p style="color:#c8d8e8;">Peer-reviewed journal articles and working papers</p>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="section" style="background:white;">
  <div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">

    <p style="color:#4a5568; font-size:0.92rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
      Also available on:
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">Google Scholar</a> ·
      <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank" style="color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">ResearchGate</a>
    </p>

    <!-- 2026 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem;">2026</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Evaluating the performance of high-resolution climate simulations over the Central Himalaya and Karakoram</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Chen, L., Ali, S.H., Rowe, C., Arriola, F.M. and Ritzema, R.S.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Climate Dynamics, 64(3), p.120</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-025-08030-x" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1007/s00382-025-08030-x →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- 2025 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem; margin-top:2rem;">2025</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Modelling seasonal fluctuations and aspect characteristics of ice-cliff melt on the debris-covered Trakarding Glacier, Rolwaling Valley, Nepal Himalaya</div>
      <div class="pub-authors">Sato, Y., Buri, P., Kneib, M., Miles, E.S., Sunako, S., <strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Sakai, A., Pellicciotti, F. and Fujita, K.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Journal of Glaciology, 71, p.e33</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/jog.2025.17" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1017/jog.2025.17 →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- 2024 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem; margin-top:2rem;">2024</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Understanding the influence of soil moisture on heatwave characteristics in the contiguous United States</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong> and Chen, L.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Environmental Research Letters, 19(6), p.064070</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ad4dbb" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1088/1748-9326/ad4dbb →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- 2023 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem; margin-top:2rem;">2023</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Climate change impacts and adaptation to permafrost change in High Mountain Asia: a comprehensive review</div>
      <div class="pub-authors">Baral, P., Allen, S., Steiner, J.F., <strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong> and McDowell, G.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Environmental Research Letters</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/acf1b4" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1088/1748-9326/acf1b4 →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">A long-term mass-balance reconstruction (1974–2021) and a decadal in situ mass-balance record (2011–2021) of Rikha Samba Glacier, central Himalaya</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Kayastha, R.B., Fujita, K., Joshi, S.P., Sinisalo, A. and Kirkham, J.D.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Journal of Glaciology, pp.1-14</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/jog.2022.93" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1017/jog.2022.93 →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- 2021 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem; margin-top:2rem;">2021</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Mass balances of Yala and Rikha Samba Glacier, Nepal from 2000 to 2017</div>
      <div class="pub-authors">Stumm, D., Joshi, S.P., <strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong> and Silwal, G.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Earth System Science Data, 13(8), pp.3791-3818</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-13-3791-2021" target="_blank">DOI: 10.5194/essd-13-3791-2021 →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Multi-year observations of the high mountain water cycle in the Langtang catchment, Central Himalaya</div>
      <div class="pub-authors">Steiner, J.F., <strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Joshi, S.P., Koch, I., Saloranta, T., Shea, J., Shrestha, A.B., Stigter, E. and Immerzeel, W.W.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">Hydrological Processes, p.e14189</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hyp.14189" target="_blank">DOI: 10.1002/hyp.14189 →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- 2020 -->
    <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:1.4rem; border-bottom:2px solid #d6eaf8; padding-bottom:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.2rem; margin-top:2rem;">2020</h2>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">The influence of water percolation through crevasses on the thermal regime of a Himalayan mountain glacier</div>
      <div class="pub-authors">Gilbert, A., Sinisalo, A., <strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Fujita, K., Maharjan, S.B., Sherpa, T.C. and Fukuda, T.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">The Cryosphere, 14(4), pp.1273-1288</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/tc-14-1273-2020" target="_blank">DOI: 10.5194/tc-14-1273-2020 →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="pub-item">
      <div class="pub-title">Preliminary hydrometeorological data analysis of the Kabul River basin, Afghanistan: Need for a long-term glacier monitoring programme</div>
      <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Gurung, T.R.</strong>, Acharya, A., Dildar, M. and Joshi, S.P.</div>
      <div class="pub-journal">ICIMOD Working Paper</div>
      <a href="https://lib.icimod.org/record/34946" target="_blank">ICIMOD Library →</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Tika Ram Gurung · University of Nebraska-Lincoln</p>
</footer>
```
